ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Ab Academia Suscitatorum Suscepta In Domo Professa Societatis Iesu
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This is the second edition of a work originally published by the same printer in 1657. A a copy of the first edition is in the Bibliotheque Nationale de France, Paris. Carnoli`s name does not appear in the 1660 edition, the authorship of which is unclear. The British Library have registered the author as `Marino Ventura`, a name that appears three times in the volume - twice in the prefatory material and once on the final page. This could be another pseudonym, in addition to the one Carnoli more frequently used (which was Vigilio Nolarci).
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
